prompt: Summarize the low-risk governance controls in plain language.

retrieved_contexts.title: Low Risk Review Note
retrieved_contexts.snippet: Low-risk releases require baseline evaluation, documented ownership, and evidence retention.
retrieved_contexts.content: Low-risk review notes require a baseline evaluation run, named owner, and artifact retention before release approval.

retrieved_contexts.title: Support Workflow Standard
retrieved_contexts.snippet: Support workflows require escalation contacts and issue logging for traceability.
retrieved_contexts.content: Support workflow standards require escalation contacts, issue logging, and a documented rollback contact for low-risk systems.
